Namtar.title: Namtar
Namtar.Name: [color=#ff6030]Namtar's Brand[/color]
Namtar.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 10 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself
     apply [color=#ff6030]Ash Debt[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     heal 5 for each ally
     suffering a [color=#ff5050]harmful Effect[/color]

[color=#707070]Effect[/color]
[color=#ff6030]Ash Debt[/color]: per stack, your allies take 5 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]
Namtar.Description_Unit: The burnt herald counts every wound you offer him and teaches your followers to carry it onward.

Namtar.title: Namtar
Namtar.name: [color=#ff6030]Namtar[/color]
Namtar.brief: The fire-faced herald of the burning court. Counts each wound and teaches his followers to pass affliction from flesh to flesh.
Namtar.description_start:
Prayers move curses onto allies, force their retaliation, and turn accumulated affliction into healing

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 10 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself
     apply [color=#ff6030]Ash Debt[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     heal 5 for each ally
     suffering a [color=#ff5050]harmful Effect[/color]

[color=#707070]Effect[/color]
[color=#ff6030]Ash Debt[/color]: per stack, your allies take 5 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]
Namtar.prayer:
O [color=#ff6030]Namtar[/color],

fire-faced herald,

scribe of the burning court,

what burns in me,

burn in all,

receive this wound!
Namtar.description:
You worship [color=#ff6030]Namtar, the Burnt Herald[/color].

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], you deal 10 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself and gain [color=#ff6030]Ash Debt[/color].

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], you heal 5 for each ally suffering a [color=#ff5050]harmful Effect[/color].

[color=#ff6030]Ash Debt[/color] makes your allies take 5 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage per stack on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color].

Namtar's prayers cast your suffering into followers, force them to carry it into battle, and distill the resulting corruption into healing.

sahru.title: sahru
sahru.name: [color=#ff6030]Sahru[/color]
sahru.description:
Remove all [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] from yourself

Apply them to all allies

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live
sahru.description_short:
Remove all [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] from yourself and apply them to all allies
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live

rabisu.title: rabisu
rabisu.name: [color=#ff6030]Rabisu[/color]
rabisu.description:
Force all allies to [color=#ff8030]hit[/color] 1 enemy in range

Replicate their [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] onto that enemy

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an adjacent ally is [color=#ffff50]damaged by an enemy[/color]
rabisu.description_short:
Force all allies to [color=#ff8030]hit[/color] and replicate their [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] onto enemies
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an adjacent ally is [color=#ffff50]damaged by an enemy[/color]

balatu.title: balatu
balatu.name: [color=#ff6030]Balatu[/color]
balatu.description:
Heal yourself and all allies based on how many [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] they currently have

[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = 10 * your Willpower * harmful effects[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live
balatu.description_short:
Heal yourself and all allies based on their [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = 10 * your Willpower * harmful effects[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live

AshDebt.title: AshDebt
AshDebt.name: Ash Debt
AshDebt.description: per stack: your allies take 5 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]

Namtar.title: Namtar
Namtar.text: Those who serve Namtar blacken their faces with soot and count each wound as a letter in his hidden scripture. Their curses are never theirs alone for long; what burns in one body is carried into another, until even mercy reeks of ash.
